segments.text: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his steadfast love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Give thanks to the God of gods, for his steadfast love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who alone does great wonders, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who by understanding made the heavens, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who spread out the earth above the waters, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who made the great lights, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: the sun to rule over the day, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: the moon and stars to rule over the night, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who struck down the Egyptians in their firstborn, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and brought Israel out from among them, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: with a strong hand and an outstretched arm, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who divided the Red Sea in two, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and made Israel pass through the midst of it, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: but overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who led his people through the wilderness, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to him who struck down great kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and killed mighty kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sihon, king of the Amorites, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and Og, king of Bashan, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and gave their land as a heritage, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: a heritage to Israel his servant, for his steadfast love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: It is he who remembered us in our low estate, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: and rescued us from our foes, for his steadfast love endures forever;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: he who gives food to all flesh, for his steadfast love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Give thanks to the God of heaven, for his steadfast love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
